mentions.note: Pharma giant with strong execution; Cramer bullish; one of two favorite pharma plays (alongside Regeneron).
Strong pipeline from JP Morgan healthcare conference very impressive; good earnings plus potential weight loss drug news could send Dow stock higher.

Maritide quarterly GLP-1 addresses persistence; Rapatha LDL-lowering proven 36% cardiac risk reduction; rare disease $5B+ run rate; solid mosaic of secular growth, 3% yield, potential blockbuster pipeline.
